EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} carried out a local Pass_The_Hash attack on host {event_src.host} to escalate privileges. The attacker used the NTLM hash of user {object.account.name}.
User {subject.account.name} carried out a Pass-the-Hash attack from host {event_src.host} to login to host {datafield2} using the NTLM hash of user {object.account.name}
